Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Methods
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.Context.processArgs()
    As of version 5, Vert.x is no longer tightly coupled to the CLI
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpClientRequest.sendHead()
    instead use HttpClientRequest.writeHead(), this is scheduled for removal in Vert.x 6
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpClientRequest.sendHeadAndAwait()
    instead use HttpClientRequest.writeHead(), this is scheduled for removal in Vert.x 6
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpClientRequest.sendHeadAndForget()
    instead use HttpClientRequest.writeHead(), this is scheduled for removal in Vert.x 6
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpConnection.goAway(long)
    instead use HttpConnection.shutdown()
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpConnection.goAway(long, int)
    instead use HttpConnection.shutdown()
    io.vertx.mutiny.core.http.HttpConnection.goAway(long, int, Buffer)
    instead use HttpConnection.shutdown()
    io.vertx.mutiny.ext.web.client.WebClient.request(HttpMethod, RequestOptions)
    instead use WebClient.request(RequestOptions)
    io.vertx.mutiny.ext.web.client.WebClient.request(HttpMethod, SocketAddress, RequestOptions)
    instead use WebClient.request(RequestOptions)
    io.vertx.mutiny.ext.web.sstore.cookie.CookieSessionStore.create(Vertx, String, Buffer)
    use CookieSessionStore.create(Vertx, String) Creates a CookieSessionStore. This factory method is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. The salt value is ignored and should not be used. This was an artifact of the original implementation which used a different encryption scheme.
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.brpoplpush(String, String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: BLMOVE with the RIGHT and LEFT arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.brpoplpushAndAwait(String, String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: BLMOVE with the RIGHT and LEFT arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.brpoplpushAndForget(String, String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: BLMOVE with the RIGHT and LEFT arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.ftDebug(List<String>)
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.ftDebugAndAwait(List<String>)
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.ftDebugAndForget(List<String>)
    this command no longer exists in the latest Redis release
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadius(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymember(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH and GEOSEARCHSTORE with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberRo(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberRoAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusbymemberRoAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS and FROMMEMBER arguments
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusRo(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusRoAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.georadiusRoAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: GEOSEARCH with the BYRADIUS argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.getset(String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: SET with the !GET argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.getsetAndAwait(String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: SET with the !GET argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.getsetAndForget(String, String)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: SET with the !GET argument

    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.hmset(List<String>)
    since Redis 4.0.0, replaced by: HSET with multiple field-value pairs
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.hmsetAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 4.0.0, replaced by: HSET with multiple field-value pairs
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.hmsetAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 4.0.0, replaced by: HSET with multiple field-value pairs
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.psetex(String, String, String)
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the PX argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.psetexAndAwait(String, String, String)
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the PX argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.psetexAndForget(String, String, String)
    since Redis 2.6.12, replaced by: SET with the PX argument
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.quit(List<String>)
    since Redis 7.2.0, replaced by: just closing the connection
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.quitAndAwait(List<String>)
    since Redis 7.2.0, replaced by: just closing the connection
    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.quitAndForget(List<String>)
    since Redis 7.2.0, replaced by: just closing the connection

    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.zrangebylex(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the BYLEX argument

    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the BYLEX argument

    io.vertx.mutiny.redis.client.RedisAPI.zrevrange(List<String>)
    since Redis 6.2.0, replaced by: ZRANGE with the REV argument
